old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2.1","title":"Enforce atomic OSCORE reservations","description":"Complete Rust OSCORE crash/concurrency safety with storage-mediated compare-and-swap or an exclusive context-owner lease. Every sequence-consuming public protect path must require a reservation token obtained by atomically advancing persisted state before encryption; Context::new must not let reused key material self-assert freshness; restored ordinary-response one-shot state must be persisted or no-PIV responses prohibited. Remove SecureStack plaintext/mutable-stack bypasses.","design":"Reservation storage owns CAS(expected,next) or an exclusive lease. In-memory Context state alone cannot coordinate multiple processes or prove key material is fresh.","acceptance_criteria":"Two simulated processes restoring the same expected sequence race and exactly one reserves/transmits; all public request/fresh-PIV response paths require reservation capability; blind-write callbacks reject; crashes after reserve cause gaps not reuse; ordinary response state is persisted or disabled; SecureStack cannot bypass OSCORE through mutable plaintext stack; no_std tests and three security reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:36:35.659588Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T00:36:35.659588Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.48.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T00:36:35.806967Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: {"notes":"Completed atomic context-bound CAS reservations, explicit fresh registration versus restore-only loading, crash-safe sequence gaps, transactional ordinary response replay commits, strict RFC option/KID/context handling, authenticated secure ingress, CoAP correlation/ACK handling, and C.4-C.8 vectors. Observe deferred to linked follow-up. Gates: OSCORE all/no-default/Cortex-M, node std, scoped strict Clippy, and three hash-bound security reviews."}
Atomic OSCORE reservation and secure ingress acceptance complete
